item.title: Why is Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 20-Apr, Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd recorded a modest increase in its share price, rising by 0.41% to ₹172.50. This upward movement comes despite the stock's underperformance relative to broader market benchmarks over longer time frames, reflecting a nuanced market sentiment. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Sharat Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 20-Apr, Sharat Industries Ltd’s stock price rose by 1.85% to ₹151.00, continuing a positive trend supported by robust long-term returns and recent outperformance against its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is CESC Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 20-Apr, CESC Ltd's stock price rose sharply by 4.61% to ₹179.40, continuing a robust upward trend supported by strong returns, rising investor participation, and attractive valuation metrics. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Madhav Infra Projects Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 20-Apr, Madhav Infra Projects Ltd’s stock price has experienced a slight decline, reflecting a complex interplay of recent gains and longer-term challenges despite increased investor interest. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Prism Johnson Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 20-Apr, Prism Johnson Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, climbing 4.84% to close at ₹130.95. This gain reflects a combination of short-term market dynamics and investor sentiment despite the company’s ongoing fundamental challenges. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is BN Agrochem Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 20-Apr, BN Agrochem Ltd’s stock price declined by 0.85% to ₹232.90, reversing gains after three consecutive days of upward movement despite a robust one-year return of 65.18% and impressive sales growth. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is PTC India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 20-Apr, PTC India Ltd's stock price rose sharply by 3.87% to close at ₹191.95, reflecting robust investor confidence driven by sustained outperformance against benchmarks and increasing market participation. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Munjal Showa Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 20-Apr, Munjal Showa Ltd. witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹130.45 with a gain of ₹2.45 or 1.91%. This upward momentum reflects the stock’s sustained outperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: When is the next results date for Mantra Capital Limited?
item.description: The next results date for Mantra Capital Limited is April 25, 2026. Time: Apr 20 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Shekhawati Industries Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Shekhawati Industries Ltd is April 27, 2026. Time: Apr 20 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Trent Ltd.?
item.description: The next results date for Trent Ltd. is April 22, 2026. Time: Apr 20 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: E2E Networks Q4 FY26: Strong Revenue Surge Masks Profitability Concerns
item.description: E2E Networks Ltd., India's leading hyperscaler focused on advanced Cloud GPU infrastructure, reported a dramatic turnaround in Q4 FY26 (Mar'26), posting a net profit of ₹6.44 crores after three consecutive quarters of losses. However, the company's return to profitability comes with significant caveats that warrant investor scrutiny. With a market capitalisation of ₹5,663 crores, the stock has declined 3.45% following the results announcement, reflecting market concerns about sustainability and valuation. Time: Apr 20 2026 09:46 PM IST

item.title: PNB Gilts Q4 FY26: Profit Plunge Raises Concerns Despite Stable Revenue
item.description: PNB Gilts Ltd., a leading primary dealer in government securities, reported a sharp decline in profitability for Q4 FY26, with net profit plummeting 82.69% quarter-on-quarter to ₹12.99 crores from ₹53.91 crores in Q3 FY26. The year-on-year performance showed an even steeper decline of 82.69% compared to ₹75.02 crores in Q4 FY25. The disappointing results triggered a negative market reaction, with the stock trading at ₹74.41 as of April 20, 2026, down 20.85% over the past year and significantly underperforming the broader market. Time: Apr 20 2026 09:45 PM IST

item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: Strong Profit Growth and Sectoral Trends in Mar-2026 Results
item.description: The March 2026 quarterly earnings season has revealed a marked improvement in corporate profitability, with 58.0% of the 69 companies reporting positive results, a significant rise from 46.0% in December 2025. Mid and small cap stocks have led this upswing, signalling renewed investor confidence and sectoral resilience amid a mixed macroeconomic backdrop. Time: Apr 20 2026 09:00 PM IST
